name: kenspc
description: Structured development workflows for Claude Code, aligned with Opus 4.7 at xhigh/max effort. Eleven reusable subagents drive brief generation, plan generation, task decomposition, automated batch implementation, and multi-angle parallel review. v3 follows five design rules: workflow SOP stays, business rules framed as why-not-command, DONE-criteria over step-by-step flow, no anti-rationalization scaffolding, and plain language over MUST/NEVER/CRITICAL/ULTRATHINK.
